raw_comment:
1. I noticed that even though China and India have about the same population, China has a lot more of all resources across the board than China does. 
2. I wonder why there is more use of fossil fuels in countries have access to cleaner resources?
3. We use power for everything in our everyday-lives, we should know where it is coming from, and how much it costs. 
4. Headline: Energy & Power
ace_sentences: China and India have about the same population.
China has a lot more of all resources across the board than China does.
There is more use of fossil fuels in countries.
These countries have access to cleaner resources.
We use power for everything in our everyday-lives.
We should know where power is coming from.
We should know how much power costs.
